description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in business-casual attire, featuring a collared long-sleeve shirt tucked into fitted trousers. He wears a necktie and a belt, and his shoes are formal, complementing the professional look. The figure has a neatly groomed beard and mustache, and his hair is short and styled with a side part. His hands are relaxed and open at his sides, and his posture is upright and natural. The overall appearance suggests a professional or office worker, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, business districts, or public transportation areas.
description: A bearded adult male in business-casual attire with a collared shirt, tie, trousers, and formal shoes, standing upright with a professional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, tie, belt, facial hair, and both hands open at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the side part hairstyle, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, trousers, and shoes, with arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hairstyle, and relaxed hand position.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve collared shirt with necktie, fitted trousers, and formal belt
